since_last: 36% of 85 AI names green; Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical leads +1.01%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 36% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.29% · BTC -0.91% · Gold +0.65% · Nasdaq100 -1.36%. 36% of 85 AI names are green — broad selling. Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical is doing the heavy lifting at +1.01%.

cards.headline: Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical leads, AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical at +1.01%; weakest is AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure at -1.81%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: INOD is the standout at +11.85%
cards.body: Leaders: INOD +11.85%, SPCX +11.23%, MGNI +8.51%, TLN +7.51%, ARM +6.29%. Laggards: INTC -6.36%, KLAC -5.56%, SMR -5.40%, MRVL -5.35%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +11.23% at $214.12
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +11.23% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
